case_title: LAWRENCE M SCANCARELLI VS. FRANCESCA VALDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED JAN-17-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 435 BROADWAY LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2015 BY QUEENA HO. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. 2 DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT 435 BROADWAY IS REPRESENTED BY KARL PLESKOT AND FRANCESCA VALDEZ - MANAGING MEMBER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
